creator: crhalpin@hobbes.home.crhalpin.org
text:
There's a new upstream version of pidgin-facebookchat

Fix: PORTNAME=	pidgin-facebookchat
-PORTVERSION=	1.60
+PORTVERSION=	1.61
 CATEGORIES=	net-im
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
 DISTNAME=	${PROJECTHOST}-source-${PORTVERSION}
How-To-Repeat: 	NA
